id: writes-location-data-back-to-immich-photos
title: "Writes location data back to Immich photos"
description: "Pushes latitude/longitude updates for the supplied Immich asset IDs back to the user's Immich instance."

  children={"Writes location data back to Immich photos"}

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/immich/enrich"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Pushes latitude/longitude updates for the supplied Immich asset IDs back to the user's Immich instance.
